meta.tagline: Day 22. Israel hit Tehran again overnight. US bunker-busted Natanz. Oil above $110. S&P down 1.5%.
meta.greeting: Good morning, Cafe crew - its Saturday and the war entered week four.

headlines: Israel striking Tehran again - US bunker-busted Natanz
S&P 500 down 1.51% - Dow off 444 points, VIX spiked 11%
Oil up 45% since war began - Strait of Hormuz shutdown
Iran threatens to hit UAE after attacks from its territory
Elon Musk found liable - jury says he cheated Twitter investors
CBS Radio shut down after 99 years

articles.title: US Dropped Bunker Busters on Irans Nuclear Facility. Again.
articles.excerpt: The US used GBU-57 bombs on Natanz this morning. Israel struck Tehran again overnight. Day 22. Strikes are intensifying, not winding down.
articles.body:
The US dropped bunker-buster bombs on Irans Natanz uranium-enrichment facility this morning. These arent small bombs. The GBU-57 Massive Ordnance Penetrator weighs 30,000 pounds.

Israels defense minister said strikes will significantly escalate this week. Israel hit Tehran again overnight. Iranian attacks are down 90% from early days.

Meanwhile, Trump posted on Truth Social that the US is getting very close to meeting our objectives. The Pentagon is using 30,000-pound bombs. Those are not winding-down bombs.

Irans new supreme leader remains unseen. Intelligence agencies cant confirm hes giving orders. Day 22 of a war that was supposed to be quick.
articles.barista_take: Trump says winding down. Pentagon dropped 30,000-pound bombs. Words and bombs sending different messages.

articles.title: Iran Just Threatened to Bomb the UAE
articles.excerpt: Iran warned the UAE: any more attacks from your territory and well hit Ras Al Khaimah. The war is pulling in countries that arent in it.
articles.body:
Irans military warned the UAE: if any further aggression comes from UAE territory, Iran will subject Ras Al Khaimah to heavy strikes.

The UAE isnt at war with Iran. But attacks on disputed islands apparently came from UAE territory. Saudi Arabia intercepted 10 drones. Kuwait was under missile attack. The UK warned Iran against targeting British bases.

The war started between the US, Israel, and Iran. Its now threatening the entire Gulf.
articles.barista_take: Iran threatened the UAE. Saudi shooting down drones. Kuwait under missiles. Contained has left the chat.

articles.title: Cluster Munitions Hit a Daycare. Israel Cancelled Passover Camps.
articles.excerpt: An Iranian cluster munition struck a daycare in Rishon Lezion. Passover camps cancelled in 18 municipalities.
articles.body:
A cluster munition from an Iranian ballistic missile struck a daycare in Rishon Lezion this morning. Israel cancelled Passover holiday camps in 18 municipalities.

Israels defense minister said strikes on Iran will significantly escalate this week in response. Day 22. Both sides call this a war of survival.
articles.barista_take: Cluster munitions on a daycare. Passover camps cancelled. The war isnt somewhere else anymore.

articles.title: CBS Radio Died After 99 Years. Nobody Had a Good Day.
articles.excerpt: CBS shut down its radio news service running since 1927. 99 years of broadcast journalism, gone in a layoff memo.
articles.body:
CBS shut down its radio news service this week. It ran since September 1927. For 99 years, CBS Radio delivered news to 700 stations.

Same week a judge ruled Pentagon press restrictions unconstitutional. Same week the FCC threatened broadcast licenses. The medium that carried Edward R. Murrow during WWII couldnt survive corporate layoffs during a new war.
articles.barista_take: 99 years of CBS Radio. Gone in a memo. Murrow is rolling.

articles.title: S&P Down 1.5%. Dow Off 444. VIX Spiked 11%.
articles.excerpt: S&P at 6,506. Dow off 444 points. Nasdaq fell 2%. VIX spiked 11%. HSBC says markets are pricing in recession.
articles.body:
Fridays close: S&P 500 at 6,506 down 1.51%. Dow at 45,577 down 444 points. Nasdaq at 21,648 down 2.01%. VIX spiked 11.3% to 26.78.

HSBC says markets are pricing in a recessionary outcome. The Strait of Hormuz is in near-total shutdown. Oil has risen 45% since the war started.

The US lifted sanctions on Iranian oil on ships as a 30-day measure. Its at $110. And climbing.
articles.barista_take: S&P down 1.5%. Dow off 444. VIX up 11%. The markets horoscope: absolutely not.

articles.title: Gold Crashed 3% on Friday. During a War. Heres Why.
articles.excerpt: Gold dropped from $4,700 to $4,575 during a war with VIX spiking. The answer: margin calls.
articles.body:
Gold dropped 3.1% Friday to $4,575. During a war. When VIX spiked 11%. Thats backwards.

When stocks crash hard, leveraged funds sell whatever has gains to cover losses. Gold was up big this year. It got sold to pay for stock losses.

The fundamentals havent changed. The price just got cheaper for a technical reason.
articles.barista_take: Gold down 3% during a war. Not because gold is broken. Because everything else is.

articles.title: Gas Heading to $5. Oil Up 45% in 22 Days.
articles.excerpt: Hormuz is shut. Oil up 45% since Feb 28. Gas heading to $5 nationally. Fill up this weekend.
articles.body:
Oil has risen 45% since the war began. The Strait of Hormuz is in near-total shutdown.

Gas heading to $5/gallon in the US. The US lifted sanctions on Iranian oil on ships as a 30-day band-aid.

Fill up this weekend. $110 oil hasnt fully hit your pump yet. It will by Wednesday.
articles.barista_take: Oil up 45% in 22 days. Hormuz shut. Gas heading to $5. Fill up today.

articles.title: Jury: Musk Deliberately Tanked Twitters Stock to Buy It Cheap
articles.excerpt: Musk didnt disclose his 5% stake on time, kept buying cheap, saved $150M. The jury called it securities fraud.
articles.body:
A jury found Musk liable for deliberately driving down Twitters stock before his $44B acquisition. He didnt disclose his 5% ownership on time, kept buying at lower prices, and saved $150M.

The man who bought Twitter to save free speech got found liable for not speaking up when the law required it.
articles.barista_take: Musk saved $150M by staying quiet. The jury said thats fraud. Free speech has a disclosure deadline.

articles.title: Bitcoin Is Quietly Winning the War Trade
articles.excerpt: Bitcoin gained 1.3% Friday while stocks crashed and gold got sold. Since the war started, its outperformed everything.
articles.body:
While stocks crashed and gold got margin-called Friday, Bitcoin gained 1.3% to $70,947.

Since the war began, Bitcoin has outperformed the S&P 500, Nasdaq, and gold. Bitcoin isnt tied to oil supply chains, cant be sanctioned, and doesnt need Hormuz.

Polymarket gives gold 47% chance of being 2026s best asset, Bitcoin 39%, S&P just 14%.
articles.barista_take: Stocks crashed. Gold got margin-called. Bitcoin went up. 2026 is weird.

articles.title: The First Amendment Had the Busiest Week of Its Life
articles.excerpt: FCC threatened licenses. A judge tossed Pentagon press rules. CBS Radio died. Three punches to journalism in one week.
articles.body:
Three things happened to journalism this week:

The FCC threatened to revoke broadcast licenses for fake news about the war.

A federal judge tossed Pentagon press restrictions as unconstitutional.

CBS shut down its 99-year-old radio news service.

The First Amendment got a stress test.
articles.barista_take: FCC threatens press. Judge defends press. CBS fires press. The First Amendment needs a drink.

articles.title: Three Careers This War Just Invented
articles.excerpt: Compliance analysts. Geopolitical risk modelers. Cleared cyber. Three careers that barely existed before Feb 28.
articles.body:
Securities compliance analyst: the Musk verdict reminded every company disclosure timing matters. No law degree needed.

Geopolitical risk analyst: oil moved 45% in 22 days. Every fund needs someone who can model this. Six figures.

Cleared cybersecurity: get a clearance and Palantir, Booz Allen, Leidos will fight over you.
articles.barista_take: Compliance. Geopolitical risk. Cleared cyber. Three careers the last 22 days invented.

articles.title: The Saturday LinkedIn Move Nobodys Making
articles.excerpt: The algorithm doesnt take weekends off. Your competition does. One post. 20 minutes. Zero competition.
articles.body:
Post on LinkedIn on Saturday. The algorithm doesnt sleep. Your competition does. Saturday posts get dramatically less competition.

Todays pitch: The US just bunker-busted Irans nuclear facility. Heres what it means in 60 seconds. 300 words. Tag three people. Post.
articles.barista_take: Saturday. LinkedIn. 20 minutes. Zero competition. Your future boss scrolls on weekends.

articles.title: Week 4 of War News. Your Brain Is Running on Fumes.
articles.excerpt: 22 days of cortisol. Your prefrontal cortex is degraded. One hour offline isnt lazy - its neuroscience.
articles.body:
22 straight days of war news creates measurable cognitive fatigue. Slower decisions. Lower motivation. Less creativity.

One hour today: no news, no markets, no war. Your brain needs the break to keep caring well. The war will be there at noon.
articles.barista_take: Day 22. Cortisol maxed. One hour offline. Neuroscience says so.

articles.title: $110 Oil Is Ruining Your Sleep
articles.excerpt: Financial stress from gas and groceries is the #1 sleep disruptor in 2026. A 10-minute notebook brain dump helps.
articles.body:
Financial stress from rising gas and grocery prices is now the #1 reported sleep disruptor in the US.

The fix: 10-minute pre-sleep brain dump. Write every financial worry on paper. Not to solve them. To get them out of your head. Reduces sleep onset time by 15 minutes.
articles.barista_take: $110 oil keeping you up. A notebook and 10 minutes. Cheaper than melatonin.

articles.title: Three Wins. One Priority. Before the News.
articles.excerpt: The whole system fits on a Post-it. Three completions. One Monday priority. Before you open a single app.
articles.body:
Before news or social media: write three things you completed this week. Not planned - completed. Most people undercount wins by 40%.

Pick one thing for Monday. Not most urgent - most important. Three wins. One priority. Post-it. Before the news.
articles.barista_take: Three wins. One Monday priority. Post-it. Before Twitter. Thats literally it.

articles.title: 47 Tabs Open. Your Brain Has Room for One.
articles.excerpt: Close all tabs except one. 25-minute timer. Then the next. Your brain has 2GB of RAM.
articles.body:
One-tab rule: close everything except the current task. 25-minute timer. Done. Next tab.

Every open tab is a cognitive thread running in the background. Bookmark the rest. Theyll exist Monday. Your focus wont.
articles.barista_take: 47 tabs. Zero focus. Close 46. Timer. Your RAM called - it wants its life back.

articles.title: Turn Saturdays News Into Side Income
articles.excerpt: The news is overwhelming. You explain it in 300 words. 45 minutes. $7K/month potential at scale.
articles.body:
Pick todays biggest story. 300 words. Plain English. Post on LinkedIn. Tag three people.

Every Saturday for a month. 1,000 followers then launch a paid Substack at $7/month. 1,000 subs x $7 = $7,000/month.
articles.barista_take: The news is the content. Youre the translator. 45 minutes. $7K/month at scale.

articles.title: You Cant Calm the Storm. Calm Yourself.
articles.excerpt: Bunker busters on nuclear facilities. Markets crashing. None of it is in your control. Your first hour is.
articles.body:
Bunker busters on Natanz. Cluster munitions on daycares. Markets pricing recession. Gold crashing. Oil at $110. CBS Radio dead.

None of that is in your control. Your first hour today is. The war will be there at noon. Use the morning.
articles.quote: You cant calm the storm. So stop trying. What you can do is calm yourself.
articles.barista_take: 22 days of storm. Your first hour is yours. Use it before the news takes it.

on_this_day.text: US invaded Iraq. 23 years later, US forces are bunker-busting another countrys nuclear facilities.
CBS Radio launched. This week, 99 years later, CBS shut it down.
John Lennon married Yoko Ono. They held a Bed-In for Peace. Fewer bunker busters.

meme.closer: Its Saturday. The news didnt get the memo.

cafe_wins: One hour offline - no news, no markets, no war updates
Write 3 things you accomplished this week
Fill up your gas tank - oil at $110
Write your Monday priority before opening Slack
One full hour of focused work before lunch
